title: Elementary School Teachers, Except Special Education
description: Teach academic and social skills to students at the elementary school level.

tasks.text: Instruct students individually and in groups, using teaching methods such as lectures, discussions, and demonstrations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Establish and enforce rules for behavior and procedures for maintaining order among the students.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Guide and counsel students with adjustment or academic problems or with special academic interests.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Adapt teaching methods and instructional materials to meet students' varying needs and interests.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan and conduct activities for a balanced program of instruction, demonstration, and work time that provides students with opportunities to observe, question, and investigate.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare materials and classrooms for class activities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Read books to entire classes or small groups.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Observe and evaluate students' performance, behavior, social development, and physical health.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with parents or guardians, teachers, counselors, and administrators to resolve students' behavioral and academic problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Meet with parents and guardians to discuss their children's progress and to determine priorities for their children and their resource needs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Use computers, audio-visual aids, and other equipment and materials to supplement presentations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Meet with other professionals to discuss individual students' needs and progress.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Establish clear objectives for all lessons, units, and projects and communicate those objectives to students.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare and implement remedial programs for students requiring extra help.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assign and grade class work and homework.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare, administer, and grade tests and assignments to evaluate students' progress.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Prepare students for later grades by encouraging them to explore learning opportunities and to persevere with challenging tasks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain accurate and complete student records as required by laws, district policies, and administrative regulations.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Enforce administration policies and rules governing students.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Organize and lead activities designed to promote physical, mental, and social development, such as games, arts and crafts, music, and storytelling.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide a variety of materials and resources for children to explore, manipulate, and use, both in learning activities and in imaginative play.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare objectives and outlines for courses of study, following curriculum guidelines or requirements of states and schools.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare for assigned classes and show written evidence of preparation upon request of immediate supervisors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Instruct and monitor students in the use and care of equipment and materials to prevent injuries and damage.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Confer with other staff members to plan and schedule lessons promoting learning, following approved curricula.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collaborate with other teachers and administrators in the development, evaluation, and revision of elementary school programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Attend professional meetings, educational conferences, and teacher training workshops to maintain and improve professional competence.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Administer standardized ability and achievement tests, and interpret results to determine student strengths and needs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan and supervise class projects, field trips, visits by guest speakers or other experiential activities, and guide students in learning from those activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare reports on students and activities as required by administration.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Supervise, evaluate, and plan assignments for teacher assistants and volunteers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Organize and label materials and display students' work.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform administrative duties, such as school library assistance, hall and cafeteria monitoring, and bus loading and unloading.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Attend staff meetings and serve on committees, as required.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Select, store, order, issue, and inventory classroom equipment, materials, and supplies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Involve parent volunteers and older students in children's activities to facilitate involvement in focused, complex play.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide students with disabilities with assistive devices, supportive technology, and assistance accessing facilities, such as restrooms.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sponsor extracurricular activities, such as clubs, student organizations, and academic contests.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
